title: Memory leak in sqlite3_create_collation_v2()
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_collation (id UInt64, name String, value Int32 DEFAULT 0) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT * FROM test_collation WHERE value > (SELECT AVG(value) FROM test_collation);
CREATE TABLE additional_data (data_id UInt64, test_id UInt64, FOREIGN KEY (test_id) REFERENCES test_collation(id)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY data_id;
